what_it_does: This file is a minimal channel-attachment metadata record that declares an attachment of type board_items and links it to a board item via a board:// URI in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
An added timestamp with timezone is present.
standouts: Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item.
Attachment record is completely content-free beyond the link and timestamp.
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone offset.
concerns: The attachment carries no title, summary, or payload, so its reason for existence is not self-evident from the file alone.
notes: A bare attachment stub that points a board_items attachment to board item item-b3e08fe0 in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state is held by the referenced board item item-b3e08fe0?
What is the intended semantics of the board_items attachment_type?
intention_signals: To create a persistent, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item within an otherwise empty attachment record.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, timestamped edge record that connects the dragnet-development channel attachment store to a board item, enabling cross-referencing without embedding the target content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record of type board_items targeting board item item-b3e08fe0 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record a link between a channel attachment and a board item for traceability.
